item.title: Perspectivity; Extracting and Changing the image in a poster
item.description: Here is a python program that uses cv2 to replace the image in a poster. First identify the four corners: Then compute the perspectivity through these four points in the camera image onto a rectangular plane. This will be a projection matrix that can be used to extract the picture from the frame. import cv2 import numpy camera_image_points = numpy.array([ (191,31), # Top left (330,27), # Top right (328,225), # Bottom right (187,217) # Bottom left ], dtype=numpy.

item.title: OpenCV Image Onto Video
item.description: Nullam et orci eu lorem consequat tincidunt vivamus et sagittis magna sed nunc rhoncus condimentum sem. In efficitur ligula tate urna. Maecenas massa sed magna lacinia magna pellentesque lorem ipsum dolor. Nullam et orci eu lorem consequat tincidunt. Vivamus et sagittis tempus. *row* *col* *Third hi how are you there today? k 199 200 def function(a): return a + 1 Okay, there is enough wrong with this to make it preferable to just use org mode to export the contents.

item.title: First post?
item.description: and what goes here? def function(a): return a + 1
